goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 19:30' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should depart from 'norwich' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '8 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'entrance fee'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 19:30 and should go to cambridge
The train should depart from norwich and should leave on tuesday
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 8 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
Make sure you get area and entrance fee
